titleStmt.title: SII 26.690: original edition by P. R. Srinivasan
No. 690. (A.R. No. 645 of 1909.) KŌNĒRIRĀJAPURAM, THANJAVUR TALUK, THANJAVUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription is damaged in some places. It contains the praśasti of the king commencing with Tirumaṉṉi vaḷara, etc.

It records a gift of a sandhi lamp and a sum of 6 kāśu to provide for burning the lamp in the temple of the god Tirunallamuḍaiya Āditta Īśvaramuḍaiya-mahādēvar of Tirunallam, a Brahmadēyam in Veṇṇāḍu in Uyyakkoṇḍār-vaḷanāḍu, by a certain Tēvaraḍiyān-baṭṭan Araṅgaṉ alias Tava[. .] of the same place. It is stated that the money was received by a number of persons having right of worship in the temple who had agreed to burn the lamp for ever.

It also records a gift of 4 kāśu by the same donor, which was received by Pādaśivan Veṇkāḍa-nakkamāṇi, Nallattamiga Śirāḷaṉ, Mādēvan Tiruppugalūr and Varaguṇanaḷḷāṟan, the uvachchas of the temple, who had agreed to play on all the various drums to the god (details lost).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tirumaṉṉivaḷara Irunilamaṭaṉtaiyum poṟcceyap pāvaiyuñcirttaṉi celviyum
taṉ perunteviyarāki Iṉpuṟa neṭutuyar Ūḻiyuḷiṭaituṟai naāṭun tuṭarvanaveli
ppaṭar vanavāciyum cuḷḷicūḻ matiṭ koḷḷippākkaiyum naṇṇaṟ karumuraṇ ma
ṇṇaikkaṭakkamum porukaṭal Īḻattaraiyar tamuṭiyu māṅkavar teviyar Oṅkeḻil muṭiyumu
ṉṉavan pakkal teṉṉavan vaitta cuntara muṭiyum Intiranāramum teṉkaṭal
Īḻamaṇṭala muḻuvatum Eṟipaṭaikkeraḷaṉ muṟaimaiyil cūṭuṅ kulataṉamākiyac muṭiyum ceṅkatir mālaiyuñ caṅkatir velait tolperuṅkāval pal paḻantivum mā
pporutaṇṭāk koṇṭa kopparakecaripanmarāna śrīrājentracoḻatevaṟku yāṇṭu 7 Āvatu Uyyakkoṇṭār vaḷanāṭṭu veṇṇāṭṭu brahmadeyam tirunala
ttu śrīkoyiluṭaiya kaviciyanakkaṉ vaṉum Ivantampi tiru kan colaiyum māṭilan manakkaṉum kavuciyan nakkaṉu
m kavuciyaṉ tāyan Iṣapavāganaṉum tampimārum parāntakaṉ cantiracekara tiripurāntakapaṭṭaṉum Ivvaṉaivom Ivvūrtte napaṭṭan raṅkaṉāṉa tava
ṭaikkoṇṭa kācu 6 Ikkācu Āṟukkum Ittirunallamuṭaiya Ātitta Īśvara- muṭaiya mahādevarkku cantirātittaval Iravai san=tiyil Oru can=tiviḷakku Erikka piṭi E
ṇṇaippiṭi nāḷopāti Erittu Eṅkaḷ paṟkal vilaikoṇṭārum Oṟṟikkoṇṭārum dānam peṟṟārum munṟum Erikkakaṭavāru Ivviḷakkuc cantirātittaval Eritte Aṉubhavikka Ivva
ṉaivom panmāheśvararakṣai . Ivvūr pātacivan veṇkāṭanakka māṇiyum nallattamika cirāḷaṉum mātevan tiruppukalūrum varakuṇanaḷḷāṟan muḷḷiṭṭa Uvaccakaḷom tevara
ṭiyāna paṭṭan Araṅkaṉāna tiva koṇ cu kkācu nālukku cantirana ṭaiya māhātevarkku cantirātittaval śrīpe kāṭṭi maṭalakina pinpu Aṉaiccakalanaiyuṅkoṇṭu cittirakūṭa tiru paṇiyākavum pakkal vilaikoṇṭārum Oṟṟikoṇṭāru maṟṟum koṭṭap pukuntārum cantirātittavarai koṭṭi śe
y vaṟavikka kaṭavomākavum Ivarkaḷukku Ikkācu kuṭuppittu kallil veṭṭuvitten Ivan makaṉ paṭṭan kavaiyattevan Itu panmāheśvara rakṣaiḥ §
Digital edition of SII 26.690 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
